title: Best look
description: Best Look is a lightweight visual modpack that transforms Minecraft to look closer to the official trailers
body:
## **Modpack Showcase**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Z-rZHQkCfBM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---
## 🎥 Best Look - Inspired by Minecraft Trailers
**Ever wondered why Minecraft trailers look so beautiful?**  
This modpack aims to replicate that stunning, vibrant look — combining stylish textures, smooth animations, immersive particles, and realistic sounds — all while staying lightweight and performance-friendly.

---

## 🌈 Resource Packs Included

### 🟡 Bare Bones
A minimal, vibrant resource pack that strips Minecraft down to its "bare bones." It enhances color, clarity, and trailer-like visuals while staying true to the vanilla feel.  

### 🔵 Fresh Animations
Brings Minecraft to life with expressive new animations. Although OptiFine isn’t supported in Fabric, don’t worry — I’ve added 11 mods to provide compatibility.  
Expect minor issues since this is an early build, and feel free to share feedback!

---

## 🎮 Key Mods

### 🔄 Not Enough Animations  
Adds third-person animations for smoother, more realistic movement.  

### ✨ Visuality  
Client-side mod that adds ambient particles like sparkles, slime effects, hit particles, and more.  

### 🍽 Eating Animation [Fabric]  
Adds sprite-based eating and drinking animations.  

### 💨 Cave Dust  
Adds fine dust particles underground for a more immersive feel.  

### 🌧 Particle Rain  
Replaces vanilla rain/snow with detailed particle weather (even sandstorms in deserts!).  

### 💬 Make Bubbles Pop  
Revamps bubble physics, adding realistic rise and burst behavior — and extra effects for chests, barrels, and explosions underwater.  

### 🌊 Wakes  
Adds water wake effects when you move through water.  

### 👣 Presence Footsteps  
Adds dynamic footstep sounds based on block type for deeper immersion.  

### 🔊 Sound Physics Remastered  
Realistic sound propagation: muffled audio through walls, echoes in caves, etc.  

### 🎵 Ambient Sounds  
Adds ambient background audio to every biome and environment.  

### ⚔️ Better Combat  
Combat overhaul with spectacular melee animations, inspired by Minecraft Dungeons.  

### And more Mods to explore.

---

## 🧱 OptiFine Parity for Fabric

These mods recreate OptiFine features without needing OptiFine:

- **[EMF] Entity Model Features** – Enables custom entity models (CEM).
- **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** – Enables custom textures for entities and players.
- **Continuity** – Supports connected and emissive textures.
- **CIT Resewn** – Adds custom item textures (CIT) support.
- **Nyf’s Spiders** – Makes spiders more realistic and creepy.

---

## ⚙️ Performance Mods

For low-end PCs, **Sodium** is included for enhanced performance.  
❌ OptiFine is not compatible with Fabric — but don’t worry, we’ve replaced its best features with better mods.

---

## ✨ Shader recommendations

**BSL Shaders** are recommended for the best visual experience.  
Make sure to install and enable shaders via **Iris** (This well not Be included in the modpack).

---

## 🙌 Special Thanks

Huge thanks to **@lowresbones**,this modpack wouldn’t be possible without him.

---

## 📦 Final Step Before You Play

After launching the game:
1. Go to **Options → Resource Packs**
2. You well need to Apply all the Resource packs.

---

💬 Feedback is welcome!  
Report bugs or suggestions via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/dssb3/Best-look-issues/issues) or message me on social media.
